frontmatter.title: babygo
frontmatter.description: Go by Example, run like rustlings: all 85 programs with the load-bearing lines cut out, a watcher that re-runs on save, and a checker that machine-verifies every single exercise.
frontmatter.bannercaption: Go by Example, but nothing counts until the check passes
